ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the subjects */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the data was collected */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hour of the day the data was collected */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples collected */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the health metric */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the health metric */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the health metric */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the subjects */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric (e.g., heart rate, activity level, etc.) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health metric data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metric data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hours ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages within the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subjects */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the user */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered in the system */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user (e.g., sedentary, moderately active, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metric data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_access_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, nurse, etc.) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the healthcare provider registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "user_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user metric entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metric was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)
